name_policy: Personal names remain in original English.
spoiler_policy: Only information available through each current paragraph is used.

blocks.original_text: It seemed as though he had been falling for years.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran感觉自己仿佛已经坠落了许多年。
blocks.literary_note_zh: years把昏迷期间的客观时间转成无尽主观坠落，章节开头没有先确认Bran是否活着。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Fly, a voice whispered in the darkness, but Bran did not know how to fly, so all he could do was fall.
blocks.explanation_zh: 黑暗中的声音要他飞，但他不知道如何飞，只能继续下坠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Maester Luwin made a little boy of clay, baked him till he was hard and brittle, dressed him in Bran’s clothes, and flung him off a roof. Bran remembered the way he shattered. “But I never fall,” he said, falling.
blocks.explanation_zh: 梦中Maester Luwin制作并从屋顶扔下一个穿Bran衣服的陶土男孩；Bran一边坠落一边坚持自己从不失足。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 陶土替身把身体写成可烧硬、可破碎的物件；Bran说“从不坠落”与正在坠落构成梦的反讽。
blocks.background_zh: **前文联系：** Bran从塔上坠落后一直昏迷；陶土男孩是梦境形象，不是Maester Luwin现实中已被证实做过的仪式。

blocks.original_text: The ground was so far below him he could barely make it out through the grey mists that whirled around him, but he could feel how fast he was falling, and he knew what was waiting for him down there. Even in dreams, you could not fall forever. He would wake up in the instant before he hit the ground, he knew. You always woke up in the instant before you hit the ground.
blocks.explanation_zh: 地面仍在灰雾下很远处，但越来越近；Bran确信自己会像普通噩梦那样在撞地前醒来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 反复出现的instant before建立Bran用于安慰自己的梦境规则，下一句立即攻击这条规则。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: And if you don’t? the voice asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: 声音反问：如果没有醒来呢？
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: The ground was closer now, still far far away, a thousand miles away, but closer than it had been. It was cold here in the darkness. There was no sun, no stars, only the ground below coming up to smash him, and the grey mists, and the whispering voice. He wanted to cry.
blocks.explanation_zh: 黑暗、寒冷和逼近的地面使Bran想哭。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Not cry. Fly.
blocks.explanation_zh: 声音用押韵式命令纠正他：不要cry，而要fly。
blocks.literary_note_zh: cry／fly只差一个辅音，crow把情绪反应改写成生存行动，形成全章反复的语言节奏。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “I can’t fly,” Bran said. “I can’t, I can’t . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran反复说自己不会飞。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: How do you know? Have you ever tried?
blocks.explanation_zh: 声音问他从未尝试过，怎么能确定。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: The voice was high and thin. Bran looked around to see where it was coming from. A crow was spiraling down with him, just out of reach, following him as he fell. “Help me,” he said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran发现一只crow与自己一同盘旋下落，便向它求救。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: I’m trying, the crow replied. Say, got any corn?
blocks.explanation_zh: crow说自己正在帮忙，却突然问Bran有没有corn。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 生死训导突然转成讨corn的滑稽口吻，使crow既神秘又顽皮，拒绝成为庄严导师的单一形象。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran reached into his pocket as the darkness spun dizzily around him. When he pulled his hand out, golden kernels slid from between his fingers into the air. They fell with him.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran从口袋掏出金色谷粒，它们也在空中与他一起下坠。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: The crow landed on his hand and began to eat.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow落在他的手上吃corn。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “Are you really a crow?” Bran asked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran问它是否真的是crow。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Are you really falling? the crow asked back.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow反问Bran是否真的在坠落。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 反问把“crow是否真实”转回Bran自身处境：梦中形象真假不如坠落后果真假重要。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “It’s just a dream,” Bran said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran以这一切只是梦来解释。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Is it? asked the crow.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow质疑这个结论。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “I’ll wake up when I hit the ground,” Bran told the bird.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran坚持撞地时自己会醒。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran在无尽梦境中坠落，three-eyed crow以fly／cry的语言游戏破坏他“撞地前会醒”的自我安慰。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: You’ll die when you hit the ground, the crow said. It went back to eating corn.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow冷静地说撞地意味着死亡，然后继续吃corn。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 死亡警告与继续啄食并置，crow把Bran最恐惧的事当作简单事实。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran looked down. He could see mountains now, their peaks white with snow, and the silver thread of rivers in dark woods. He closed his eyes and began to cry.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran已能看见雪山、森林与银线般河流，于是闭眼哭泣。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: That won’t do any good, the crow said. I told you, the answer is flying, not crying. How hard can it be? I’m doing it. The crow took to the air and flapped around Bran’s hand.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow说哭没有用，答案是飞，并以自己能飞作为示范。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “You have wings,” Bran pointed out.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran指出crow拥有翅膀。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Maybe you do too.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow回答Bran也可能拥有翅膀。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran felt along his shoulders, groping for feathers.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran摸索肩膀，寻找羽毛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: There are different kinds of wings, the crow said.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow解释翅膀不止一种。
blocks.literary_note_zh: different kinds of wings把飞行从身体器官转成尚未说明的能力或认知方式；当前不能确定具体机制。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran was staring at his arms, his legs. He was so skinny, just skin stretched taut over bones. Had he always been so thin? He tried to remember. A face swam up at him out of the grey mist, shining with light, golden. “The things I do for love,” it said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran注意到自己异常消瘦；灰雾中浮出金色发光的脸，重复把他推下塔前说过的话。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 金色面孔和原句直接恢复Chapter 8结尾的压抑记忆；消瘦也表明外界已经过去一段时间。
blocks.background_zh: **文本事实：** 金色面孔说出的原句与Chapter 8推Bran下塔前的话一致；Bran的意识正在触及被压住的记忆。

blocks.original_text: Bran screamed.
blocks.explanation_zh: 这段记忆使Bran尖叫。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: The crow took to the air, cawing. Not that, it shrieked at him. Forget that, you do not need it now, put it aside, put it away. It landed on Bran’s shoulder, and pecked at him, and the shining golden face was gone.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow叫他忘掉并收起那段记忆，又啄他使金色面孔消失。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow不是说记忆不真实，而是说Bran现在不需要它；生存训练暂时压过追问凶手。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran was falling faster than ever. The grey mists howled around him as he plunged toward the earth below. “What are you doing to me?” he asked the crow, tearful.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran下坠更快，哭着问crow究竟在对自己做什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Teaching you how to fly.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow说是在教他飞。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “I can’t fly!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran仍坚持自己不会。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: You’re flying tight now.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow说他此刻已经在飞；本PDF版本印作tight now，结合语境通常理解为right now。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 页面图像和文字层均印作tight now，并非提取器误认；结合Bran下一句，语义通常理解为right now。本文件保留源版措辞并注明疑似版本排印错误。
blocks.background_zh: **文本校勘：** 页面图像与文字层均为“flying tight now”，因此不是OCR错误；上下文语义通常应为“right now”。精读不擅改源文，只标注疑似版本排印错误。

blocks.original_text: “I’m falling!”
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran认为自己只是在坠落。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Every flight begins with a fall, the crow said. Look down.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow说每次飞行都始于一次坠落，并命他向下看。
blocks.literary_note_zh: every flight begins with a fall把事故重新组织成起点；它没有美化危险，而是要求Bran在危险中选择行动。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “I’m afraid . . . ”
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran承认自己害怕。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: LOOK DOWN!
blocks.explanation_zh: crow以大写命令他必须往下看。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow让Bran承认死亡风险，并把被推下塔的记忆暂时移开，迫使他从寻找可见翅膀转向面对坠落。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran looked down, and felt his insides turn to water. The ground was rushing up at him now. The whole world was spread out below him, a tapestry of white and brown and green. He could see everything so clearly that for a moment he forgot to be afraid. He could see the whole realm, and everyone in it.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran俯瞰整个世界；极度清晰的景象暂时取代恐惧。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 恐惧因观看而暂时消失：look down既是面对死亡，也是获得超越个人身体的视野。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: He saw Winterfell as the eagles see it, the tall towers looking squat and stubby from above, the castle walls just lines in the dirt. He saw Maester Luwin on his balcony, studying the sky through a polished bronze tube and frowning as he made notes in a book. He saw his brother Robb, taller and stronger than he remembered him, practicing swordplay in the yard with real steel in his hand. He saw Hodor, the simple giant from the stables, carrying an anvil to Mikken’s forge, hefting it onto his shoulder as easily as another man might heft a bale of hay. At the heart of the godswood, the great white weirwood brooded over its reflection in the black pool, its leaves rustling in a chill wind. When it felt Bran watching, it lifted its eyes from the still waters and stared back at him knowingly.
blocks.explanation_zh: 他从高空看见Winterfell众人和weirwood；城堡尺度缩小，weirwood却察觉凝视并回望他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 俯瞰使人造城墙缩成泥地线条，weirwood却能回望；权力尺度与古老自然意识形成反差。
blocks.background_zh: **专名：** weirwood是Winterfell godswood中心的心树；此前已写其树干有人脸。梦中它主动回望Bran。

blocks.original_text: He looked east, and saw a galley racing across the waters of the Bite. He saw his mother sitting alone in a cabin, looking at a bloodstained knife on a table in front of her, as the rowers pulled at their oars and Ser Rodrik leaned across a rail, shaking and heaving. A storm was gathering ahead of them, a vast dark roaring lashed by lightning, but somehow they could not see it.
blocks.explanation_zh: 向东看时，他看见Catelyn与Ser Rodrik乘船、桌上的血染匕首，以及他们尚未察觉的风暴。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 读者已知匕首和航程；storm既可按画面理解为天气，也可能具有象征意味，不能提前锁定。
blocks.background_zh: **前文联系：** Catelyn正携刺杀Bran所用的匕首前往King’s Landing，Ser Rodrik在海上晕船。

blocks.original_text: He looked south, and saw the great blue-green rush of the Trident. He saw his father pleading with the king, his face etched with grief. He saw Sansa crying herself to sleep at night, and he saw Arya watching in silence and holding her secrets hard in her heart.
blocks.explanation_zh: 向南看时，他看见悲伤的Eddard、哭泣的Sansa和把秘密藏在心中的Arya。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 三人分别以pleading、crying、holding secrets出现，把南方危机压缩成求情、哀伤和沉默。
blocks.background_zh: **前文联系：** Eddard与Robert为Lady争执；Sansa失去Lady，Arya则经历Mycah之死和证词冲突。

blocks.original_text: There were shadows all around them. One shadow was dark as ash, with the terrible face of a hound. Another was armored like the sun, golden and beautiful. Over them both loomed a giant in armor made of stone, but when he opened his visor, there was nothing inside but darkness and thick black blood.
blocks.explanation_zh: 三道象征性阴影笼罩他们：hound面孔、金色太阳铠甲，以及内部只有黑暗与黑血的石甲巨人。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 本段采用shadow而非姓名。hound与前文人物有明显联想，但三道影子的完整对应和未来含义仍不应定论。
blocks.background_zh: **事实／推测：** 这些都是梦中的shadow意象。可以依据hound、gold和stone建立联想，但当前文本没有给出完整、唯一的身份答案。

blocks.original_text: He lifted his eyes and saw clear across the narrow sea, to the Free Cities and the green Dothraki sea and beyond, to Vaes Dothrak under its mountain, to the fabled lands of the Jade Sea, to Asshai by the Shadow, where dragons stirred beneath the sunrise.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran越过narrow sea看见Free Cities、Dothraki sea、Vaes Dothrak、Jade Sea与Asshai，那里有dragons在日出下苏动。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 视野从家族危机扩展到世界地理；dragons stirred是梦中画面，不能据此断言现实中的具体状态。
blocks.background_zh: **世界地理：** Free Cities和Dothraki sea位于narrow sea以东；Vaes Dothrak是Dothraki圣城，Asshai在已知世界遥远东方。

blocks.original_text: Finally he looked north. He saw the Wall shining like blue crystal, and his bastard brother Jon sleeping alone in a cold bed, his skin growing pale and hard as the memory of all warmth fled from him. And he looked past the Wall, past endless forests cloaked in snow, past the frozen shore and the great blue-white rivers of ice and the dead plains where nothing grew or lived. North and north and north he looked, to the curtain of light at the end of the world, and then beyond that curtain. He looked deep into the heart of winter, and then he cried out, afraid, and the heat of his tears burned on his cheeks.
blocks.explanation_zh: 最后他向北越过Wall和沉睡的Jon，看见无尽冰原，直到世界尽头光幕之外的heart of winter，恐惧得哭喊。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 句中反复north推动视线越过已知地图；对heart of winter的恐惧是本章最明确的生存理由。
blocks.background_zh: **北方：** Wall以北仍有森林、海岸与冰原；光幕之外的heart of winter属于Bran梦中所见，地理与性质尚未解释。

blocks.original_text: Now you know, the crow whispered as it sat on his shoulder. Now you know why you must live.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow说Bran现在已经知道自己为什么必须活下去。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran获得覆盖Winterfell、南方、东方和极北的梦中视野；heart of winter让生存使命第一次超出个人复仇。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “Why?” Bran said, not understanding, falling, falling.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran仍不理解，边坠落边问为什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran获得覆盖Winterfell、南方、东方和极北的梦中视野；heart of winter让生存使命第一次超出个人复仇。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Because winter is coming.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow用Stark家语回答：winter is coming。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 家族格言在这里不再只是气候警告，而成为crow解释Bran必须活下去的答案。
blocks.background_zh: **家族格言：** “Winter is coming”是House Stark的words；在此被赋予超越普通季节变化的威胁语气。

blocks.original_text: Bran looked at the crow on his shoulder, and the crow looked back. It had three eyes, and the third eye was full of a terrible knowledge. Bran looked down. There was nothing below him now but snow and cold and death, a frozen wasteland where jagged blue-white spires of ice waited to embrace him. They flew up at him like spears. He saw the bones of a thousand other dreamers impaled upon their points. He was desperately afraid.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran发现crow有第三只眼；下方冰矛上刺着无数其他dreamers的骨骸。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 第三只眼象征一种可怕的知见；其他dreamers的骨骸说明训练具有失败和死亡风险。
blocks.background_zh: **称谓：** 直到本段读者才明确看见crow有三只眼；“three-eyed crow”由此成为稳定称呼。

blocks.original_text: “Can a man still be brave if he’s afraid?” he heard his own voice saying, small and far away.
blocks.explanation_zh: 恐惧中，他想起自己曾问Eddard：害怕时还能不能勇敢。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Bran用自己的童声回忆Chapter 1的问题，把父亲的伦理教导带入没有父亲在场的选择。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: And his father’s voice replied to him. “That is the only time a man can be brave.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 记忆中的Eddard回答，只有害怕时才谈得上勇敢。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard关于勇气的旧话帮助Bran作出fly or die的选择；他飞起后又被crow啄中额心。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Now, Bran, the crow urged. Choose. Fly or die.
blocks.explanation_zh: crow逼Bran立即选择：飞，或者死。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Choose是转折核心：crow无法替Bran飞，导师能做的是逼他承认选择属于自己。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Death reached for him, screaming.
blocks.explanation_zh: 死亡以尖叫着伸手的形象逼近。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard关于勇气的旧话帮助Bran作出fly or die的选择；他飞起后又被crow啄中额心。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran spread his arms and flew.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran张开双臂，终于飞了起来。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 极短句在长时间坠落后制造突然的解放；飞行首先是Bran接受行动，而非长出可见羽翼。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Wings unseen drank the wind and filled and pulled him upward. The terrible needles of ice receded below him. The sky opened up above. Bran soared. It was better than climbing. It was better than anything. The world grew small beneath him.
blocks.explanation_zh: 看不见的翅膀承接风力，把他从冰刺上方拉起；飞行比攀爬更自由。
blocks.literary_note_zh: “better than climbing”把新能力与Bran旧身份最热爱的活动连接，也暗示醒来后的Bran已不再是原来的攀爬者。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “I’m flying!” he cried out in delight.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran欣喜地宣布自己会飞了。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Eddard关于勇气的旧话帮助Bran作出fly or die的选择；他飞起后又被crow啄中额心。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: I’ve noticed, said the three-eyed crow. It took to the air, flapping its wings in his face, slowing him, blinding him. He faltered in the air as its pinions beat against his cheeks. Its beak stabbed at him fiercely, and Bran felt a sudden blinding pain in the middle of his forehead, between his eyes.
blocks.explanation_zh: three-eyed crow冷淡回应，随后拍翼遮眼并啄中Bran两眼之间，使他剧痛。
blocks.literary_note_zh: crow先教会飞再啄额心，帮助带有疼痛和强制；第三眼位置与两眼之间的刺痛相互呼应。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: “What are you doing?” he shrieked.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran尖叫着问crow在做什么。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 梦境撕开，Bran在Winterfell苏醒；腿部无感觉揭示身体代价，而direwolf的温暖与Summer之名提供反意象。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: The crow opened its beak and cawed at him, a shrill scream of fear, and the grey mists shuddered and swirled around him and ripped away like a veil, and he saw that the crow was really a woman, a serving woman with long black hair, and he knew her from somewhere, from Winterfell, yes, that was it, he remembered her now, and then he realized that he was in Winterfell, in a bed high in some chilly tower room, and the black-haired woman dropped a basin of water to shatter on the floor and ran down the steps, shouting, “He’s awake, he’s awake, he’s awake.”
blocks.explanation_zh: 灰雾像帷幕被撕开，crow变成黑发serving woman；Bran发现自己躺在Winterfell塔房，女人惊叫他醒了。
blocks.literary_note_zh: veil意象标记梦与清醒界面被撕开；serving woman的叫声把宇宙视野骤然拉回具体病房。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: Bran touched his forehead, between his eyes. The place where the crow had pecked him was still burning, but there was nothing there, no blood, no wound. He felt weak and dizzy. He tried to get out of bed, but nothing happened.
blocks.explanation_zh: Bran额心仍有灼痛却没有伤口；他虚弱眩晕，想下床时身体毫无反应。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 没有外伤却有灼痛保留梦境的身体余波；“nothing happened”从普通失败逐步显露更严重事实。
blocks.background_zh: **身体事实：** Bran已经醒来，双腿无法按意愿动作；具体医学诊断和恢复可能性在当前段落尚未由Maester说明。

blocks.original_text: And then there was movement beside the bed, and something landed lightly on his legs. He felt nothing. A pair of yellow eyes looked into his own, shining like the sun. The window was open and it was cold in the room, but the warmth that came off the wolf enfolded him like a hot bath. His pup, Bran realized . . . or was it? He was so big now. He reached out to pet him, his hand trembling like a leaf.
blocks.explanation_zh: direwolf跃上他的双腿而Bran毫无感觉；狼已长大许多，身体的温暖包住他。
blocks.literary_note_zh: 狼落在腿上却无感觉，是瘫痪状态最克制的揭示；与此同时狼的热量提供生命与陪伴。
blocks.background_zh: 本段没有新增可确认的世界观事实；梦境语言允许建立意象联系，但不把象征推测写成后续情节结论。

blocks.original_text: When his brother Robb burst into the room, breathless from his dash up the tower steps, the direwolf was licking Bran’s face. Bran looked up calmly. “His name is Summer,” he said.
blocks.explanation_zh: Robb冲进房间时direwolf正舔Bran的脸；Bran平静地为它命名Summer。
blocks.literary_note_zh: Summer与heart of winter、冰与死亡形成直接对照；命名说明Bran醒来后获得了新的确定性。
blocks.background_zh: **命名：** Bran的direwolf此前一直没有名字；Summer是他苏醒后的第一个明确决定，并与冬季意象对立。
